items.title: IPL 2026: Mumbai Indians’ de Kock, Raj Bawa ruled out of remainder of season
items.summary: De Kock has been ruled out with a tendon injury in his left wrist, while Raj Angad Bawa suffered a ligament tear in his right thumb
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
